message:
fix(fcp-streaming): reset reconnect counter on successful reconnection

StreamHealthTracker.reconnect_count was monotonically increasing even
after healthy reconnection. Reset to 0 in record_reconnected() since
the counter tracks consecutive attempts since last healthy connection.
Update doc comment and add assertion.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
